fileContext.overview: LocalProvider is a class that connects to OpenAI-compatible local inference servers, providing a way to interact with these servers through a unified interface.

symbols.name: LocalProvider
symbols.purpose: Connects to OpenAI-compatible local inference servers
symbols.behavior: Provides a unified interface to interact with local inference servers

parameters.baseUrl: The base URL of the local inference server
parameters.model: The name of the model to use
parameters.apiKey: The API key to use (defaults to 'local')
parameters.name: The name of the provider (defaults to 'local')
parameters.serverLabel: The label for the server (defaults to 'local LLM server')

symbols.returns: An LLMResponse object containing the result of the request
symbols.limitations: Does not handle cases where the server returns an error or does not respond with a JSON body

symbols.name: complete
symbols.purpose: Makes a request to the local inference server to complete a task
symbols.behavior: Sends a POST request to the server with the provided messages and options

parameters.messages: An array of LLMMessage objects to send to the server
parameters.maxTokens: The maximum number of tokens to return (defaults to 4096)
parameters.signal: An AbortSignal object to cancel the request if needed

symbols.returns: An LLMResponse object containing the result of the request
symbols.limitations: Does not handle cases where the server returns an error or does not respond with a JSON body

symbols.name: readStream
symbols.purpose: Reads a stream of tokens from the server
symbols.behavior: Uses a TextDecoder to decode the stream and a JSON parser to extract the tokens

parameters.body: A ReadableStream object containing the stream of tokens
parameters.signal: An AbortSignal object to cancel the request if needed

symbols.returns: An LLMResponse object containing the result of the request
symbols.limitations: Does not handle cases where the server returns an error or does not respond with a JSON body

symbols.name: readNonStreamingResponse
symbols.purpose: Reads a non-streaming response from the server
symbols.behavior: Uses a JSON parser to extract the tokens from the response

parameters.response: A Response object containing the non-streaming response

symbols.returns: An LLMResponse object containing the result of the request
symbols.limitations: Does not handle cases where the server returns an error or does not respond with a JSON body
